gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved and raised one P2: relative --output-dir failed after partial write. Fixed by normalizing filesystem output dirs to absolute paths before writing and adding a regression test.
scope: src/document_kv_cache/probe_fixtures.py; src/restaurant_kv_serving/probe_fixtures.py; package CLI/public-submodule docs and tests.
verification: pytest -q tests/test_probe_fixtures.py tests/test_project_governance.py tests/test_public_package.py; pytest -q; python -m build --wheel
what_changed: Added document_kv_cache.probe_fixtures to generate deterministic Qwen3 V1 engine adapter handoff/payload fixtures plus a legacy restaurant_kv_serving wrapper and CLI aliases.
why: Native vLLM/SGLang connector developers need repeatable real-layout Qwen3 V1 bytes and handoff JSONs for reserve/copy/bind/release probes without hand-authoring payloads or implying native injection is implemented.
